Washington Senior Living Facilities & Care Homes

138 senior living communities in Washington. Pick your region — each color on the map is one region — and browse its communities city by city.

What's available in Washington

  • Assisted Living — 76
  • Memory Care — 72
  • Independent Living — 59
  • Skilled Nursing — 37
  • Small Care Home — 28
  • Respite Care — 16
  • CCRC / Life Plan — 7

How Washington regulates senior care

Assisted living facilities and Adult Family Homes are licensed by DSHS; Washington has one of the largest small-home (Adult Family Home) sectors in the country. Lookup: Washington DSHS Aging and Long-Term Support Administration.

Washington money questions

  • What senior living costs in Washington
  • Does Washington Medicaid pay for senior care?

Senior Living Community is an independent information resource for families. We are not a referral service and do not provide medical, legal, or financial advice — for decisions about care, consult the professionals involved. Facility details change; always confirm directly with a community. Last data review: 2026-07-11. Run a senior living community? Claim your free listing or see our marketing services for communities.
